durable_improvement: Added a deterministic, fail-closed deployment evidence manifest that binds the complete proof packet by per-file SHA-256, byte size, source commit, workflow run ID, and aggregate manifest digest.
verification: Four deterministic Node tests passed locally: stable ordering, mutation sensitivity, fail-closed path/file checks, and immutable provenance validation.
remaining_blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, wire the manifest builder into the authoritative workflow immediately before artifact upload, dispatch the workflow, and prove the returned Cloudflare URL serves the exact committed research surface.
